cases.name: incremental-pull
cases.description: Applying incremental remote bundles emits affected-table invalidation for watched app tables.

cases.name: snapshot-hydrate
cases.description: Snapshot hydration emits affected-table invalidation for watched app tables.

cases.name: committed-replay
cases.description: Successful committed replay after a local push emits affected-table invalidation.

cases.name: conflict-rewrite
cases.description: Conflict-resolution rewrites emit affected-table invalidation for rewritten app rows.

cases.name: sync-union
cases.description: A sync round invalidates the union of locally pushed and remotely pulled app tables.

cases.name: successful-detach
cases.description: Successful detach clears managed app rows and emits affected-table invalidation.

cases.name: blocked-detach
cases.description: Detach blocked by unsynced local rows does not emit app-table invalidation.

cases.name: noop-detach
cases.description: Metadata-only remote-replace cancellation during anonymous detach does not emit app-table invalidation.
